enabled.description: Enable TLS provisioning for the application.

clusterDomain.description: Cluster domain used when constructing default DNS names. Parent charts should forward _cluster["cluster-domain"] to this value.

issuerRef.description: Reference to the cert-manager Issuer or ClusterIssuer that signs certificates.

group.description: API group of the issuer resource.

kind.description: Kind of the issuer resource (Issuer or ClusterIssuer).

name.description: Name of the Issuer or ClusterIssuer resource.

ca.description: Configuration for the CA certificate issued by cert-manager.

algorithm.description: Key algorithm for the CA certificate (ECDSA, RSA, or Ed25519).

duration.description: Validity duration of the CA certificate.

size.description: Key size in bits for the chosen algorithm.

certificate.description: Configuration for the leaf TLS certificate.

algorithm.description: Key algorithm for the leaf certificate (ECDSA, RSA, or Ed25519).

dnsNameSuffixes.description: List of DNS name suffixes appended to auto-generated SANs.

dnsNames.description: Explicit list of DNS SANs to add to the certificate.

duration.description: Validity duration of the leaf certificate.

encoding.description: Private key encoding format (PKCS1 or PKCS8).

renewBefore.description: How long before expiry cert-manager should renew the certificate.

secretName.description: Name of the Kubernetes Secret where the certificate is stored.

size.description: Key size in bits for the chosen algorithm.

usages.description: List of key usages for the certificate.
